rationale: For Romania, the ongoing Iran deal negotiations matter indirectly via energy prices; no new Black Sea or regional security developments this cycle.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reportedly near, Lebanon strikes continue
top_events.summary: Progress toward a US-Iran deal could reduce energy costs for Romania, but continued Lebanon strikes and deal uncertainty keep the outlook mixed.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — no new escalation
top_events.summary: The war near Romania's border continues without fresh escalation this cycle; Black Sea security situation unchanged.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI suspension for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US AI restrictions have marginal relevance for Romanian residents, mainly as a signal of tightening Western tech policy.
